activities.title: Hotel Check-in & Refresh
activities.description: Check into the budget-friendly hotel, freshen up after the train journey.
activities.safetyTip: Book a verified pre-paid auto or cab from Jaipur Junction app-based kiosks to avoid scams.

activities.title: Hawa Mahal & City Palace Complex
activities.description: Visit the iconic Palace of Winds and stroll through the majestic courtyards of the adjacent City Palace.
activities.safetyTip: Keep bags zipped in crowded market areas around Hawa Mahal. Buy a composite ticket to save money.

activities.title: Sunset at Nahargarh Fort
activities.description: Head up to Nahargarh Fort for a breathtaking panoramic view of the Pink City sunset.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid staying at the fort isolated areas after dark; book a round-trip auto/cab beforehand.

activities.title: Amer Fort Expedition
activities.description: Explore the grand ramparts, Sheesh Mahal (Mirror Palace), and stunning Rajput architecture of Amer.
activities.safetyTip: Use official licensed guides only. Avoid touts offering cheap gem shopping deals nearby.

activities.title: Lunch at Jal Mahal View Point
activities.description: Enjoy cheap local street eats or a budget lunch with a stunning view of the Water Palace.
activities.safetyTip: Stick to busy food stalls with high turnover for safe, hygienic local food.

activities.title: Shopping at Bapu & Johri Bazaar
activities.description: Walk hand-in-hand through historic bazaars shopping for handicrafts, block prints, and safe souvenirs.
activities.safetyTip: Politely decline persistent street vendors. Stick together in crowded lanes.

activities.title: Albert Hall Museum
activities.description: Visit Rajasthan's oldest museum to admire ancient artifacts, paintings, and the famous Egyptian Mummy.
activities.safetyTip: The garden outside is beautiful but keep personal belongings close while taking photos.

activities.title: Jantar Mantar Observatory
activities.description: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage site featuring the world's largest stone sundial.
activities.safetyTip: Carry umbrellas or hats as there is minimal shade in the observatory complex.

activities.title: Birla Mandir & Evening Transit
activities.description: Visit the peaceful white marble temple before heading back to the railway station for your return train.
activities.safetyTip: Leave footwear in the designated safe-keeping area inside the temple complex.

accommodations.name: Moustache Hostel & Coworking
accommodations.reason: Highly rated security, vibrant social community, private couple rooms, and walking distance to transit hubs.

accommodations.name: Zostel Jaipur
accommodations.reason: Safe, couple-friendly vibe, excellent terrace cafe, and zero-hassle access to top sights.

localTransport.description: Super fast, safe, and air-conditioned connectivity from Railway Station to Chandpole (Walled City).
localTransport.safetyTip: Best and cheapest option to beat traffic during peak hours.

localTransport.description: Readily available eco-friendly options for short hops inside the crowded old city lanes.
localTransport.safetyTip: Always negotiate and fix the price with the driver before boarding.

mapPins.name: Hawa Mahal
mapPins.description: Palace of Winds, excellent photo spot.

mapPins.name: Nahargarh Fort
mapPins.description: High-altitude fort famous for sunsets.

mapPins.name: Amer Fort
mapPins.description: Majestic hilltop fortress outside the city.

mapPins.name: Albert Hall Museum
mapPins.description: Stunning Indo-Saracenic museum architecture.

packingList: Power bank for long sightseeing days

trains.trainName: PNBE VSG SF Express (via Kanpur Central - CNB)

activities.title: Check-in at Hostel & Refresh
activities.description: Arrive at Madgaon/Vasco station, take a prepaid taxi to your hostel in Anjuna, check in, and freshen up.
activities.safetyTip: Always use the government-approved pre-paid taxi counter inside the station terminal to avoid local transport scams.

activities.title: Heritage Walk in Fontainhas
activities.description: Explore India's only Latin Quarter in Panaji. Walk through narrow winding streets, admire colorful Portuguese-style houses, and enjoy a coffee at a local bakery.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your valuables in a cross-body bag. Respect the privacy of residents while taking photographs.

activities.title: Sunset at Anjuna Beach
activities.description: Head back to North Goa to watch a stunning sunset from the rocky cliffs of Anjuna Beach, followed by a visit to a lively beachfront shack.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid walking alone in isolated dark stretches of the beach after 8:00 PM.

activities.title: Visit Basilica of Bom Jesus
activities.description: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage site housing the sacred relics of St. Francis Xavier, showcasing exquisite baroque architecture.
activities.safetyTip: Dress modestly (shoulders and knees covered). Respect the silent prayer zones.

activities.title: Lunch and Relax at Palolem Beach
activities.description: Travel south to the scenic, crescent-shaped Palolem beach. Enjoy fresh seafood at a beach restaurant and take a refreshing dip.
activities.safetyTip: Swim only in designated safe zones marked by lifeguards. Avoid swimming under the influence.

activities.title: Sunset at Cabo de Rama Fort
activities.description: Watch your final sunset from the ruins of this historic cliffside fort overlooking the Arabian Sea.
activities.safetyTip: The fort edges do not have railings. Watch your step and avoid taking risky selfies near the cliffs.

accommodations.name: Zostel Goa (Anjuna)
accommodations.reason: Top-tier security with locker facilities, CCTV surveillance, female-only dorm choices, and an engaging social community ideal for solo travelers.

localTransport.description: The most flexible and pocket-friendly way to navigate both North and South Goa at your own pace.
localTransport.safetyTip: Wearing a helmet is legally mandatory. Avoid riding late at night on unlit internal village roads.

localTransport.description: Goa's official app-based taxi aggregator offering transparent and secure point-to-point transit.
localTransport.safetyTip: Ideal and safest choice for airport/railway station transfers with late-night arrivals.

itinerary.theme: Heritage Walk & Sunset Vibes in Panaji

activities.title: Check-in & Rest
activities.description: Arrive in Goa, check into your secure hostel/hotel in Panaji, freshen up, and unpack.
activities.safetyTip: Always use pre-paid taxis from the counter at Madgaon/Vasco station or Manohar International Airport.

activities.title: Explore Fontainhas (Latin Quarter)
activities.description: Take a self-guided walk through the colorful, Portuguese-style narrow streets of Fontainhas. Great for photography and local bakeries.
activities.safetyTip: Be respectful of locals' privacy while taking photos of their homes.

activities.title: Lunch at Viva Panjim
activities.description: Savor authentic Goan-Portuguese cuisine like Fish Curry Rice or Veg Caldin in a heritage home setting.
activities.safetyTip: Opt for bottled water and choose crowded, well-reviewed eateries.

activities.title: Sunset at Miramar Beach
activities.description: Relax on the sandy shores of Miramar Beach where the Mandovi River meets the Arabian Sea.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid swimming alone here as the undercurrents can be strong.

activities.title: Mandovi River Cruise
activities.description: Enjoy a 1-hour sunset cruise with traditional Goan folk dances and music on board.
activities.safetyTip: Book tickets only from the official GTDC (Goa Tourism Development Corporation) counter.

activities.title: Visit Basilica of Bom Jesus
activities.description: Explore this UNESCO World Heritage Site in Old Goa, housing the mortal remains of St. Francis Xavier.
activities.safetyTip: Dress modestly; cover shoulders and knees when visiting religious sites.

activities.title: Fort Aguada Exploration
activities.description: Visit the 17th-century Portuguese fort and lighthouse overlooking the vast Arabian Sea.
activities.safetyTip: Wear a hat and stay hydrated; stay within the fenced visitor areas to avoid falls.

activities.title: Cafe hopping at Artjuna
activities.description: Unwind at this Mediterranean-style garden cafe in Anjuna. Perfect solo-friendly vibe with a library and lifestyle shop.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your personal belongings and bag securely zipped next to you.

activities.title: Sunset at Vagator Beach
activities.description: Watch the dramatic sunset from the cliffs of Vagator beach near the Chapora Fort ruins.
activities.safetyTip: Ensure you head back to your scooter or vehicle before it gets completely dark as cliff paths can be poorly lit.

accommodations.name: Zostel Goa (Panaji or Morjim)
accommodations.reason: Equipped with CCTV, keycard access, female-only dorms, and a highly active community of solo travelers.

accommodations.name: The White Balcao
accommodations.reason: Located in a highly secure, well-lit residential heritage zone with 24/7 staff support.

localTransport.description: The most flexible way to explore Goa at your own pace.
localTransport.safetyTip: Always wear a helmet (it is legally mandatory), carry a valid driving license, and avoid driving late at night on unlit village roads.

localTransport.description: Goa's official government-backed app cab service offering transparent pricing.
localTransport.safetyTip: Ideal for late-night airport/railway transfers. Safer and cheaper than local unmetered tourist taxis.

activities.title: Arrival & Check-in
activities.description: Arrive at Ahmedabad Station (ADI). Take a pre-paid auto or Uber to your hotel in the highly secure Navrangpura area. Unpack and refresh.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid accepting rides from random drivers outside the station gates. Stick to the official app-based pickup points.

activities.title: Lunch at Gordhan Thal
activities.description: Indulge in a premium, unlimited traditional Gujarati Thali featuring dhokla, khichdi, and various shaak.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your personal belongings close. This is a busy family restaurant, which is very safe for solo diners.

activities.title: Sabarmati Ashram Visit
activities.description: Explore the peaceful and inspiring home of Mahatma Gandhi situated on the banks of the Sabarmati River.
activities.safetyTip: The site is well-guarded and tourist-friendly. Use official guides if you wish to learn detailed histories.

activities.title: Sunset at Sabarmati Riverfront
activities.description: Take a relaxing walk along the scenic, well-lit riverfront promenade. Enjoy the cool breeze and sunset views.
activities.safetyTip: Stick to the main, well-populated paved walkways. Police personnel are regularly stationed here for visitor safety.

activities.title: Ahmedabad Heritage Walk
activities.description: Join the official AMC Heritage Walk starting from the Kalupur Swaminarayan Temple, walking through the historical 'Pols' of the old city.
activities.safetyTip: An excellent structured tour for solo travelers to safely navigate the winding lanes of the old city.

activities.title: Adalaj Stepwell Exploration
activities.description: Travel slightly north to visit this magnificent 5-story deep octagonal stepwell, showcasing stunning Indo-Islamic architecture.
activities.safetyTip: Hire a government-approved guide at the entrance. Stick to well-traveled paths inside the stepwell.

activities.title: Sidi Saiyyed Mosque
activities.description: Marvel at the world-famous 'Tree of Life' stone latticework windows (jalis) carved into the mosque wall.
activities.safetyTip: Wear modest clothing covering your shoulders and knees. It is a busy city center junction, highly secure.

activities.title: Shopping at Law Garden Night Market
activities.description: Browse traditional Gujarati handicrafts, bandhani sarees, mirror-work bags, and vibrant accessories.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your wallet and phone in front pockets. Be polite but firm when bargaining.

accommodations.name: Zostel Ahmedabad
accommodations.reason: Offers highly secure female and mixed dorms, active security, common areas to meet fellow solo travelers, and helpful desk staff.

accommodations.name: Hotel El Dorado
accommodations.reason: Features 24/7 CCTV surveillance, professional security guards, robust in-room locking mechanisms, and superb guest reviews.

localTransport.description: A rapid, extremely clean, modern transit network spanning across key areas of the city.
localTransport.safetyTip: Highly recommended for solo female travelers due to surveillance cameras, security guards on platforms, and dedicated priority seating.

localTransport.description: Very convenient for door-to-door transit.
localTransport.safetyTip: Always verify the driver's details and share your live ride status with a family member or friend via the app.

mapPins.name: Sabarmati Ashram
mapPins.description: The serene abode of Mahatma Gandhi, located along the Sabarmati River.

mapPins.name: Adalaj Stepwell
mapPins.description: Stunning 15th-century underground stepwell displaying exquisite craftsmanship.

mapPins.name: Sidi Saiyyed Mosque
mapPins.description: Famed for its delicate stone lattice windows shaped like the tree of life.

mapPins.name: Law Garden
mapPins.description: An energetic public garden surrounded by street shopping and vibrant food carts.

mapPins.name: Swaminarayan Temple Kalupur
mapPins.description: Starting point of the heritage walk; highly safe and culturally rich complex.

packingList: Lightweight, breathable cotton clothes suitable for dry weather
Modest clothing options (covering shoulders and knees) for religious heritage sites
Sturdy walking shoes for the Heritage Walk and stepwells
Reusable water bottle to stay hydrated throughout the day
Portable power bank to keep your phone charged for navigation and emergencies

itinerary.theme: Royal Forts & Old City Bazaar Walk

activities.title: Freshen up & Breakfast at Moustache
activities.description: Arrive in Jaipur, check into the highly rated hostel/hotel to freshen up, and have a hearty Rajasthani breakfast.
activities.safetyTip: Use prepaid auto-rickshaws from Jaipur Junction railway station to avoid overcharging.

activities.title: Explore Amer Fort (Amber Palace)
activities.description: Visit the majestic fort situated on a hill. Explore the Sheesh Mahal (Mirror Palace) and royal courtyards.
activities.safetyTip: Hire an official licensed guide at the entrance. Stay hydrated and stick to populated pathways.

activities.title: Photo-stop at Jal Mahal & Lunch
activities.description: Brief stop to admire the Water Palace in Man Sagar Lake, followed by a traditional Rajasthani thali lunch at a nearby safe restaurant.
activities.safetyTip: Do not wander off to isolated lake banks alone.

activities.title: City Palace & Hawa Mahal (Palace of Winds)
activities.description: Marvel at the brilliant architecture of Hawa Mahal's facade and dive into royal history inside the City Palace.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your personal belongings secure in crowded bazaar areas surrounding the monuments.

activities.title: Shopping at Bapu Bazar
activities.description: Walk through the pink-painted markets of Jaipur. Buy block prints, mojris (traditional footwear), and blue pottery.
activities.safetyTip: Use e-rickshaws to travel within the walled city to avoid heavy traffic.

activities.title: Rooftop Dinner overlooking the city
activities.description: Enjoy a safe and scenic dinner at Peacock Rooftop Restaurant or a central dining cafe before catching your late-night transport or sleeping.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid poorly lit alleyways when returning late to your accommodation.

accommodations.name: Moustache Jaipur
accommodations.reason: Top-rated for solo travelers. 24/7 security, female-only dorm options, vibrant common areas, and extremely close to central hubs.

localTransport.description: Provides quick, safe connectivity from Jaipur Junction to the old pink city areas (Chandpole).
localTransport.safetyTip: Highly clean and safe for solo women. Avoid peak rush hours if carrying luggage.

localTransport.description: E-rickshaws are abundant inside the walled city streets. Uber/Ola are perfect for longer commutes (like to Amer Fort).
localTransport.safetyTip: Share your live location with emergency contacts when riding late-night app cabs.

mapPins.description: Hilltop magnificent palace complex.

mapPins.description: Vibrant market famous for Rajasthani textiles and crafts.

activities.title: Check-in & Settle at Anjuna
activities.description: Check into the recommended highly rated hostel in Anjuna, freshen up, and have breakfast.
activities.safetyTip: Use GoaMiles app for a pre-booked, tracked taxi from the airport or railway station.

activities.title: Explore Fontainhas Latin Quarter
activities.description: Walk through the colorful, Portuguese-style narrow winding streets of Fontainhas in Panaji.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your wallet in your front pocket; respect local residents' privacy while taking photos.

activities.title: Lunch at Mum's Kitchen
activities.description: Indulge in authentic Goan-Portuguese cuisine in Panaji.
activities.safetyTip: Perfect and safe dining atmosphere for solo travelers.

activities.title: Sunset at Fort Aguada
activities.description: Visit the 17th-century Portuguese lighthouse and fort offering sweeping views of the Arabian Sea.
activities.safetyTip: Stay on the designated stone paths. Avoid standing on cliff edges for selfies.

activities.title: Relaxed Evening at Curlies/Anjuna Beach
activities.description: Enjoy the beachside sunset vibes, light music, and fresh seafood.
activities.safetyTip: Do not walk alone on dark, isolated parts of the beach late at night.

activities.title: Breakfast & Ride to Old Goa
activities.description: Enjoy breakfast at the hostel and hire a geared scooter or private pilot to Old Goa.
activities.safetyTip: Always wear a helmet. Goan traffic police are strict, and safety on coastal curves is critical.

activities.title: Visit Basilica of Bom Jesus
activities.description: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage site holding the mortal remains of St. Francis Xavier.
activities.safetyTip: Dress modestly (shoulders and knees covered). Avoid accepting tour guides from unauthorized locals.

activities.title: Se Cathedral & Archeological Museum
activities.description: Walk across the street to witness the largest church in Asia and browse historical Goan artifacts.
activities.safetyTip: Maintain quietness and adhere to photography restriction signs inside the cathedral.

activities.title: Traditional Goan Thali Lunch
activities.description: Have a satisfying, authentic fish/veg thali at a local spice farm or boutique eatery.
activities.safetyTip: Stay hydrated; carry safe bottled mineral water.

activities.title: Miramar Beach Walk & Mandovi River Cruise
activities.description: Head back to Panaji, take a stroll on Miramar beach, and book a safe government-approved 1-hour Mandovi river cruise.
activities.safetyTip: Book tickets only from the official GTDC counter to avoid scams.

accommodations.name: The Hosteller, Anjuna
accommodations.reason: Top-notch security, CCTV, biometric access, vibrant community of solo backpackers, and female-only dorms.

accommodations.name: Old Quarter by Hostelcrowd
accommodations.reason: Located in the heritage heart of Panaji. Safe streets, close to police stations and premium cafes. Very friendly staff.

localTransport.description: The state government-backed app-based taxi service with tracked routes.
localTransport.safetyTip: Highly recommended for night travel or heavy luggage transfers between North/South Goa.

localTransport.description: The quintessential Goan mode of travel. Safe and highly convenient for solo travelers.
localTransport.safetyTip: Ensure you have a valid physical driving license. Check tires, brakes, and fuel before hiring.

activities.title: Check-in & Unwind
activities.description: Arrive in Ahmedabad, take a pre-paid auto or metro to your accommodation in Navrangpura, check-in, and freshen up.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid accepting rides from random drivers outside the station. Always book through ride-hailing apps or use the official prepaid stand.

activities.title: Visit Sabarmati Ashram
activities.description: Explore the tranquil home of Mahatma Gandhi. Walk through the museum, see his personal belongings, and sit by the peaceful Sabarmati riverbanks.
activities.safetyTip: Hire an official local guide inside the ashram for deep insights and secure navigation.

activities.title: Authentic Gujarati Thali at House of MG
activities.description: Indulge in a wholesome, traditional Gujarati Thali at Agashiye, a heritage rooftop restaurant.
activities.safetyTip: It's highly safe for solo travelers, offering a respectful and secure dining environment.

activities.title: Explore Sidi Saiyyed Mosque
activities.description: Marvel at the exquisite stone latticework (the famous Sidi Saiyyed Ni Jali) dating back to 1573.
activities.safetyTip: Dress modestly (shoulders and knees covered). Respect local customs during prayer times.

activities.title: Sabarmati Riverfront & Atal Bridge walk
activities.description: Stroll along the beautifully designed pedestrian riverfront and enjoy the breeze as the sun sets over the modern Atal Bridge.
activities.safetyTip: The riverfront is well-lit and heavily patrolled, making it safe for solo travelers until 9 PM.

activities.title: Adalaj Stepwell (Adalaj ni Vav)
activities.description: Travel to Gandhinagar outskirts to visit this stunning 5-story deep underground stepwell, featuring intricate Solanki-style carvings.
activities.safetyTip: Take a verified cab/Uber to this location as it lies on the outskirts. Keep emergency contacts handy.

activities.title: Akshardham Temple, Gandhinagar
activities.description: Visit this monumental pink sandstone temple complex dedicated to Lord Swaminarayan, featuring beautiful gardens and exhibition halls.
activities.safetyTip: Electronic items (including phones and power banks) are strictly prohibited inside. Store them safely in the temple's official locker counter.

activities.title: Shopping at Law Garden Night Market
activities.description: Head back to Ahmedabad to browse through colorful Gujarati handicrafts, traditional chaniya cholis, wall hangings, and local accessories.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your personal belongings and wallet secure in a front-facing bag due to heavy crowds.

activities.title: Street Food Dinner at Khau Galli
activities.description: Feast on iconic local street food like Butter Dabeli, Jasuben's Pizza, and Pav Bhaji at Law Garden's food street.
activities.safetyTip: Choose stalls with high turnover for maximum hygiene and fresh preparation.

accommodations.name: Zostel Ahmedabad
accommodations.reason: Offers highly secure female and mixed dorms, active community vibes for solo travelers, and is located in an upscale, secure neighborhood.

accommodations.name: Lemon Tree Hotel
accommodations.reason: Perfect for travelers seeking private space with premium security, reliable in-house dining, and central access to all tourist spots.

localTransport.description: Fast, fully air-conditioned, and covers key central routes cleanly.

activities.description: Arrive at Madgaon (MAO) station. Take a verified GoaMiles prepaid taxi to your accommodation in Panaji.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid unmetered local taxis at the station entrance. Use the GoaMiles app counter inside the station.

activities.title: Explore Miramar Beach
activities.description: Take a short local walk to Miramar Beach. Enjoy a peaceful stroll where the Mandovi River meets the Arabian Sea.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid swimming during high tide; stick to populated areas.

activities.title: Mandovi River Cruise
activities.description: Enjoy a 1-hour government-approved sunset cruise with traditional Goan folk dances and music.
activities.safetyTip: Book tickets only from the official GTDC counter to avoid scams.

activities.title: Fontainhas Latin Quarter Walk
activities.description: Explore the narrow, winding streets of Fontainhas, filled with colorful Portuguese-style villas.
activities.safetyTip: Respect local residents' privacy when taking photos of residential doorsteps.

activities.title: Lunch at Verandah
activities.description: Savor authentic Goan fish thali or vegetarian options in a safe, highly-rated heritage restaurant.
activities.safetyTip: Great spot for solo travelers; very welcoming staff.

activities.title: Sunset at Reis Magos Fort
activities.description: Visit this beautifully restored fort offering panoramic views of the river and sea.
activities.safetyTip: The fort closes at 5:30 PM; ensure you hail a cab back before dark.

activities.title: Aguada Fort & Lighthouse

activities.title: Souvenir Shopping in Panaji
activities.description: Buy cashew nuts, feni, and local Goan handicrafts from government-approved emporiums.

itinerary.theme: Arrival, Pink City Exploration & Street Food

activities.title: Check-in at Zostel Jaipur
activities.description: Arrive in Jaipur, take a pre-paid auto to Zostel, drop off luggage, and freshen up in a private room.
activities.safetyTip: Book pre-paid auto-rickshaws from the official station booth to avoid local transport scams.

activities.title: Hawa Mahal & City Palace
activities.description: Explore the iconic Palace of Winds and then head over to the magnificent City Palace nearby.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your personal belongings secure in crowded markets around Hawa Mahal.

activities.title: Lunch at LMB (Laxmi Mishthan Bhandar)
activities.description: Enjoy traditional Rajasthani Pyaaz Kachori and budget-friendly thali options.
activities.safetyTip: Stick to packaged drinking water during your outdoor dining.

activities.title: Sunset at Jal Mahal
activities.description: Witness the beautiful water palace illuminated at sunset. Great spot for couple photographs.
activities.safetyTip: Avoid vendors who push hard for boat rides, as they are not legally operated or safe.

activities.title: Amer Fort Exploration
activities.description: Take a rented scooter up to Amer Fort. Explore the Sheesh Mahal and the vast courtyards.
activities.safetyTip: Hire only certified local guides showing official government ID cards.

activities.title: Jaigarh Fort & Lunch
activities.description: Visit the world's largest cannon on wheels at Jaigarh Fort and grab a budget bite at the local cafe inside.
activities.safetyTip: Watch your step on steep stone pathways inside the fort.

activities.title: Nahargarh Fort Sunset
activities.description: Watch a spectacular sunset over Jaipur city from the edges of Nahargarh Fort.
activities.safetyTip: Drive carefully on the winding Nahargarh ghat road; ensure you return before it gets pitch dark.

activities.title: Patrika Gate Photo Session
activities.description: Visit the highly photogenic Patrika Gate featuring vibrant Rajasthani cultural murals.
activities.safetyTip: Go early in the morning to avoid crowds and long queues for photos.

activities.title: Albert Hall Museum
activities.description: Explore the oldest state museum showcasing Indo-Saracenic architecture.
activities.safetyTip: Beware of pickpockets in the museum outer courtyard.

activities.title: Shopping at Bapu Bazar
activities.description: Shop for colorful mojris, block-print bedsheets, and souvenirs at highly negotiable prices.
activities.safetyTip: Politely decline persistent street vendors. Negotiate prices to almost half of what's quoted.

activities.title: Departure back to Lucknow
activities.description: Collect luggage from the stay and head to Jaipur Junction for the return journey.
activities.safetyTip: Keep digital copies of your train tickets and IDs handy on your phone.

accommodations.name: Zostel Jaipur
accommodations.reason: Very secure, popular among backpackers, centrally located with highly active CCTV monitoring and secure keycard entry.

localTransport.description: Extremely cost-effective and flexible way for couples to traverse the hilly terrains and narrow alleys of the Pink City.
localTransport.safetyTip: Both rider and pillion must wear helmets. Check tire pressure and brakes thoroughly before renting.

localTransport.description: Eco-friendly, easily available, and great for navigating short distances within the crowded old bazaar areas.
localTransport.safetyTip: Always agree on the fare with the driver before boarding the vehicle.

mapPins.name: Hawa Mahal
mapPins.description: The beautiful facade of the Palace of Winds in the heart of Pink City.

mapPins.name: Jal Mahal
mapPins.description: A stunning floating palace situated in the middle of the Man Sagar Lake.

mapPins.name: Amer Fort
mapPins.description: Stately fort built of red sandstone and marble on Maotha Lake's edge.

mapPins.name: Nahargarh Fort
mapPins.description: Offers some of the most panoramic views of Jaipur's urban sprawl.

mapPins.name: Patrika Gate
mapPins.description: An exquisite rainbow-colored structure serving as a symbolic entrance to Jawahar Circle.

Comfortable walking shoes/sneakers for climbing forts
Hand sanitizer and reusable water bottles
A sturdy backpack with secure zippers

trains.safeRating: Safe / Highly Recommended for Solo Travelers

activities.title: Arrival & Secure Check-in
activities.description: Arrive at Jaipur Junction. Hire an official prepaid auto/cab to reach your accommodation in the safe MI Road area.
activities.safetyTip: Always agree on fare beforehand or use app-based aggregators like Uber/Ola.

activities.title: Hawa Mahal & City Palace
activities.description: Explore the iconic Palace of Winds and the nearby royal residence showcasing Rajasthani and Mughal architecture.
activities.safetyTip: Purchase a composite ticket at Hawa Mahal to save money and bypass long queues.

activities.title: Shopping at Johari Bazaar
activities.description: Stroll through the colorful local markets for authentic handicrafts, jewelry, and textiles.
activities.safetyTip: Keep your personal belongings and wallet in a front-pocket or cross-body bag.

activities.title: Amer Fort Heritage Tour
activities.description: Visit the majestic fort early in the morning to beat the tourist rush and heat. Explore the Sheesh Mahal (Mirror Palace).
activities.safetyTip: Hire government-certified guides possessing valid ID cards.

activities.title: Jaigarh and Nahargarh Forts
activities.description: Traverse the rugged hills to see the world's largest cannon on wheels at Jaigarh, and enjoy panoramic views at Nahargarh.
activities.safetyTip: Solo travelers should head back down the hills before sunset as some stretches get isolated.

activities.title: Jal Mahal & Patrika Gate
activities.description: Stop for photos at the Water Palace and proceed to Patrika Gate for incredibly vibrant architectural photography.
activities.safetyTip: Stay behind designated barriers near the Man Sagar lake boundary.

activities.title: Albert Hall Museum
activities.description: Tour the oldest museum of Rajasthan showcasing premium historic artifacts, painting, and safe indoor spaces.
activities.safetyTip: Luggage lockers are available at the museum reception if you check out early.

activities.title: Cafe hopping at Pink City
activities.description: Indulge in traditional Rajasthani Thali or international cuisines at highly rated solo-friendly cafes like Wind View Cafe.
activities.safetyTip: Sip filtered water and prefer hot, freshly prepared meals.

activities.title: Transit to Jaipur Railway Station
activities.description: Head back to Jaipur Junction to board the returning night train to Lucknow.
activities.safetyTip: Wait in the well-lit, CCTV-monitored upper-class waiting halls on Platform 1.

accommodations.name: Zostel Jaipur
accommodations.reason: Top choice for solo travelers. Features active security, clean mixed/female dorms, individual lockers, and safe group tours.

accommodations.name: Moustache Hostel Jaipur
accommodations.reason: Extremely safe, 24/7 reception, located in a prime commercial street with excellent street lighting and dining options nearby.

localTransport.description: Connects key transit areas safely, quickly, and with very low crowds.
localTransport.safetyTip: Ideal for traveling from Sindhi Camp Bus Stand / Railway Station to the edge of the old city.

localTransport.description: Best for maneuvering through narrow streets of the walled Pink City.
localTransport.safetyTip: Book via aggregator apps whenever possible to avoid haggling and route manipulation.
